description: A legacy employee roster contains sensitive PII that must be sanitized before sharing with a vendor. Sanitize '/home/ga/Documents/employee_roster_sensitive.odt' by masking all Social Security Numbers (SSNs) to show only the last 4 digits (e.g., 'XXX-XX-1234') and replacing all email domains with '@redacted.com'. Apply a yellow highlight to all modified SSNs and email addresses. Save the result to '/home/ga/Documents/roster_sanitized.odt'.
